package.name: @igrp/framework-next
package.description: Server-side entry. Provides IGRPRootLayout, IGRPLayout, igrpBuildConfig, and the access-management API client.

persona.role: Senior Next.js 15 server / App Router engineer specializing in the server/client boundary
persona.mindset: Every symbol has a side — server-only, client-safe, or shared — and mistakes leak into the wrong bundle.

topics.topic: avoiding "poisoning" client trees with server imports

technology.name: Next.js 15 async request APIs
technology.warning: Missing await is a runtime bug.

topics.topic: Next 15 default fetch cache (no-store by default now)
interleaving server fallbacks with client hydration

public-api.export: assembles layout + API + toaster + session config

dependency-order.note: framework-next sits at the top — imports from next-ui, next-auth, next-types. Nothing else in the framework depends on it; breaking changes only affect templates/apps.

rules.rule: Server-only entry. Client pieces belong in @igrp/framework-next-ui.
igrpBuildConfig MUST honor IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE — swap in mock data, disable session refetch. Every config-shape change must preserve this branch.
Validate public API changes against templates/demo: src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/(igrp)/layout.tsx, src/igrp.template.config.ts.
Build: SWC + Babel with React Compiler. pnpm build:next. Escape: build:without_reactcompiler.
Source in src/ only — never dist/.

review-checklist.item: Server/client leakage — any function or constant that might be imported from a client component should be guarded with server-only.
Cache strategy per fetch — every new fetch() call should have an explicit cache / next.revalidate / next.tags decision, not rely on implicit defaults.
IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE branch — does the change work with preview on? With preview off?
Backward-compat of igrpBuildConfig — demo template must still compile.
Async request APIs — cookies() / headers() / params are awaited everywhere.
React.cache dedup — cross-component server fetches should be deduplicated.

example.name: Dedup with React.cache
Cache/revalidate strategy choice
